info.title: mlnet
info.description: A .NET Core command line tool to automatically build, train, and generate an ML.NET model and consumption code.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ModelBindingCommandHandler.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

options.name: version
options.description: Show version information.

options.name: help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: classification
commands.description: Train a custom ML.NET model for classification. Learn more about classification at aka.ms/cli-classification.

options.name: dataset
options.description: File path to single dataset or training dataset for train/test approaches.

options.name: label-col
options.description: Name or zero-based index of label (target) column to predict.

options.name: allow-quote
options.description: Allow quote when parsing dataset, default to false

options.name: cache
options.description: Specify [On|Off|Auto] for cache to be turned on, off, or auto-determined (default).

options.name: cv-fold
options.description: Number of folds used for cross-validation. Don't specify if --split-ratio or --validation-dataset are set.

options.name: has-header
options.description: Specify [true|false] depending if dataset file(s) have header row. Use auto-detect if this flag is not set.

options.name: ignore-cols
options.description: Specify columns to be ignored in given dataset. Use space-seperated column names or zero-based indexes.

options.name: log-file-path
options.description: Path to log file.

options.name: name
options.description: Name for output project or solution to create. Default is SampleClassification.

options.name: output
options.description: Location folder for generated output. Default is current directory.

options.name: read-multi-lines
options.description: Read multiple lines when parsing data, default to false

options.name: split-ratio
options.description: Percent of dataset to use for validation. Range must be between 0 and 1. Don't specify if --cross-validation or --validation-dataset are set.

options.name: train-time
options.description: Maximum time in seconds for exploring models with best configuration. Default time is 100 sec.

options.name: validation-dataset
options.description: File path for validation dataset in train/validation approaches.

options.name: verbosity
options.description: Output verbosity choices: q[uiet], m[inimal] (default) and diag[nostic].

commands.name: regression

options.description: Specify [true|false] depending if dataset file(s) have header row. Use auto-detect if this flag is not set.

options.name: ignore-cols
options.description: Specify columns to be ignored in given dataset. Use space-seperated column names or zero-based indexes.

options.name: log-file-path

options.name: name
options.description: Name for output project or solution to create. Default is SampleRegression.

options.name: read-multi-lines

options.name: split-ratio

commands.name: recommendation
commands.description: Train a custom ML.NET model for recommendation. Learn more about recommendation at aka.ms/cli-recommendation.

options.name: dataset
options.description: File path to single dataset or training dataset for train/test approaches.

options.name: item-col
options.description: Name or zero-based index of item column. Items are recommended to users.

options.name: rating-col
options.description: Name or zero-based index of ratings (target) column to predict.

options.name: user-col
options.description: Name or zero-based index of user column. Users receive recommended items.

options.name: allow-quote
options.description: Allow quote when parsing dataset, default to false

options.name: cache
options.description: Specify [On|Off|Auto] for cache to be turned on, off, or auto-determined (default).

options.name: cv-fold
options.description: Number of folds used for cross-validation. Don't specify if --split-ratio or --validation-dataset are set.

options.name: has-header
options.description: Specify [true|false] depending if dataset file(s) have header row. Use auto-detect if this flag is not set.

options.name: log-file-path
options.description: Path to log file.

options.name: name
options.description: Name for output project or solution to create. Default is SampleRecommendation.

options.name: output
options.description: Location folder for generated output. Default is current directory.

options.name: read-multi-lines
options.description: Read multiple lines when parsing data, default to false

options.name: split-ratio
options.description: Percent of dataset to use for validation. Range must be between 0 and 1. Don't specify if --cross-validation or --validation-dataset are set.

options.name: train-time
options.description: Maximum time in seconds for exploring models with best configuration. Default time is 100 sec.

options.name: validation-dataset
options.description: File path for validation dataset in train/validation approaches.

options.name: verbosity
options.description: Output verbosity choices: q[uiet], m[inimal] (default) and diag[nostic].

options.name: training-config
options.description: path to training config file

options.name: log-file-path
options.description: Path to log file.

options.name: verbosity
options.description: Output verbosity choices: q[uiet], m[inimal] (default) and diag[nostic].

commands.name: image-classification
commands.description: Train a custom ML.NET model for image classification. Learn more about classification at aka.ms/cli-image-classification.

options.name: dataset
options.description: Path to local folder which contains labelled sub-folders of all images.

options.name: cache
options.description: Specify [On|Off|Auto] for cache to be turned on, off, or auto-determined (default).

options.name: log-file-path
options.description: Path to log file.

options.name: name
options.description: Name for output project or solution to create. Default is SampleImageClassification.

options.name: output
options.description: Location folder for generated output. Default is current directory.

options.name: test-dataset
options.description: File path to parent folder that contains test dataset in train/test approaches.

options.name: verbosity
options.description: Output verbosity choices: q[uiet], m[inimal] (default) and diag[nostic].

commands.name: text-classification
commands.description: Train a custom ML.NET model for text classification using deep learning. Learn more about text classification (aka.ms/cli-text-classification)

options.name: dataset
options.description: File path to single dataset or training dataset for train/test approaches.

options.name: label-col
options.description: Name or zero-based index of label (target) column to predict.

options.name: text-col
options.description: Name or zero-based index of input text column to train the model

options.name: allow-quote
options.description: Allow quote when parsing dataset, default to false

options.name: batch-size
options.description: Number of rows in the batch.

options.name: cv-fold
options.description: Number of folds used for cross-validation. Don't specify if --split-ratio or --validation-dataset are set.

options.name: device
options.description: The device used to train the model, can be either 'cpu' or cuda-supported device (for example 'cuda:0').

options.name: has-header
options.description: Specify [true|false] depending if dataset file(s) have header row. Use auto-detect if this flag is not set.

options.name: log-file-path
options.description: Path to log file.

options.name: max-epoch
options.description: Maximum number of times to loop through your training set.

options.name: name
options.description: Name for output project or solution to create. Default is SampleClassification

options.name: output
options.description: Location folder for generated output. Default is current directory.

options.name: read-multi-lines
options.description: Read multiple lines when parsing data, default to false

options.name: seed
options.description: Seed used for random number generator. If set, results are repeatable and will remain the same across multiple runs.

options.name: split-ratio
options.description: Percent of dataset to use for validation. Range must be between 0 and 1. Don't specify if --cross-validation or --validation-dataset are set.

options.name: validation-dataset
options.description: File path for validation dataset in train/validate approaches.

options.name: verbosity
options.description: Output verbosity choices: q[uiet], m[inimal] (default) and diag[nostic].

commands.name: forecasting
commands.description: Train a custom ML.NET model for time series forecasting.

options.name: dataset
options.description: File path to single dataset or training dataset for train/test approaches.

options.name: horizon
options.description: Defines how many periods forward you would like to forecast. The horizon is in units of the time series frequency. Units are based on the time interval of your training data, for example, monthly, weekly that the forecaster should predict out.

options.name: label-col
options.description: Name or zero-based index of label (target) column to predict.

options.name: time-col
options.description: Used to specify the datetime column in the input data used for building the time series and inferring its frequency.

options.name: allow-quote
options.description: Allow quote when parsing dataset, default to false

options.name: cache
options.description: Specify [On|Off|Auto] for cache to be turned on, off, or auto-determined (default).

options.name: cv-fold
options.description: Number of folds used for cross-validation. Don't specify if --split-ratio or --validation-dataset are set.

options.name: has-header
options.description: Specify [true|false] depending if dataset file(s) have header row. Use auto-detect if this flag is not set.

options.name: log-file-path
options.description: Path to log file.

options.name: name
options.description: Name for output project or solution to create. Default is SampleClassification.

options.name: output
options.description: Location folder for generated output. Default is current directory.

options.name: read-multi-lines
options.description: Read multiple lines when parsing data, default to false

options.name: split-ratio
options.description: Percent of dataset to use for validation. Range must be between 0 and 1. Don't specify if --cross-validation or --validation-dataset are set.

options.name: train-time
options.description: Maximum time in seconds for exploring models with best configuration. Default time is 100 sec.

options.name: validation-dataset
options.description: File path for validation dataset in train/validation approaches.

options.name: verbosity
options.description: Output verbosity choices: q[uiet], m[inimal] (default) and diag[nostic].

options.name: name
options.description: Name for output project or solution to create. Default is SampleObjectDetection

options.name: dataset
options.description: File path to single dataset or training dataset for train/test approaches.

options.name: validation-dataset
options.description: File path for validation dataset in train/validate approaches.

options.name: split-ratio
options.description: Percent of dataset to use for validation. Range must be between 0 and 1. Don't specify if --cross-validation or --validation-dataset are set.

options.name: cross-validation
options.description: Number of folds used for cross-validation. Don't specify if --split-ratio or --validation-dataset are set.

options.name: device
options.description: The device used to train the model, can be either 'cpu' or cuda-supported device (for example 'cuda:0').

options.name: seed
options.description: Seed used for random number generator. If set, results are repeatable and will remain the same across multiple runs.

options.name: batch-size
options.description: Number of rows in the batch.

options.name: epoch
options.description: Maximum number of times to loop through your training set.

options.name: width
options.description: Image resize width in pixels.

options.name: height
options.description: Image resize height in pixels.

options.name: score-threshold
options.description: Score threshold. Range between 0 and 1.

options.name: iou-threshold
options.description: Intersection-over-Union (IoU) Threashold.  Range between 0 and 1.

options.name: output
options.description: Location folder for generated output. Default is current directory.

options.name: log-file-path
options.description: Path to log file.

options.name: verbose
options.description: Output verbosity choices: q[uiet], m[inimal] (default) and diag[nostic].
